title: btrfs + rawhide: make validate failure
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**
make validate fails on fedora with btrfs.


**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. build podman master branch on fedora rawhide with btrfs

2. `make validate`


**Describe the results you received:**
```

$ make validate
find . -name '*.go' ! -path './vendor/*' -exec gofmt -s -w {} \+
git diff --exit-code
VERSION=1.18.0 GOBIN=/home/lsm5/go/bin sh ./hack/install_golangci.sh
Using existing /home/lsm5/go/bin/golangci-lint has version v1.29.1-0.20200731003908-d38d04752841 built from (unknown, mod sum: "h1:aEQdODUSthzMut4Zo0Oa4ObQkj3PxHENYoW4WjUA9EY=") on (unknown)
hack/golangci-lint.sh run

Running golangci-lint for tunnel
Build Tags tunnel: apparmor,seccomp,selinux,remote,varlink,remoteclient
Skipped directories tunnel: pkg/api
WARN [runner] Can't run linter goanalysis_metalinter: bodyclose: failed prerequisites: [buildssa@github.com/containers/podman/v2/libpod/driver: analysis skipped: errors in package: [/home/lsm5/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/libpod/driver/driver.go:4:11: could not import github.com/containers/storage (/home/lsm5/go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/storage@v1.21.2/store.go:16:4: could not import github.com/containers/storage/drivers/register (/home/lsm5/go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/storage@v1.21.2/drivers/register/register_btrfs.go:7:4: could not import github.com/containers/storage/drivers/btrfs (/home/lsm5/go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/storage@v1.21.2/drivers/btrfs/btrfs.go:15:8: could not import C (cgo preprocessing failed))))]] 
WARN [runner] Can't run linter unused: buildir: failed to load package btrfs: could not load export data: no export data for "github.com/containers/storage/drivers/btrfs" 
ERRO Running error: buildir: failed to load package btrfs: could not load export data: no export data for "github.com/containers/storage/drivers/btrfs" 
make: *** [Makefile:161: golangci-lint] Error 3
```

**Describe the results you expected:**


**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      2.1.0-dev
API Version:  1
Go Version:   go1.15rc1
Built:        Wed Dec 31 19:00:00 1969
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**


**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

Fedora rawhide with btrfs

comments.body: seems like another golangci-lint version issue on my side.
make validate seems to work fine now.
